use_cases: Switching between list, card, and grid views of a collection or product catalog
Browsing media galleries with animated transitions between layouts
Organizing and viewing digital asset collections with user-controlled display modes
E-commerce product browsing with customizable view preferences
ai_summary: A collection view mode switcher component that allows users to toggle between list, card, and pack layouts with smooth spring-based animations. Features tab-based navigation with haptic-style interactions, designed for browsing media collections, product catalogs, or digital asset libraries. Built with motion/react for performant layout transitions.
